c.d: How easy and intuitive the app is for users to navigate, subscribe, and listen to podcasts
Number of podcasts and episodes available within the app's catalog
Ability to synchronize listening progress and subscriptions across multiple devices
Inclusion of features like Trim Silence, Volume Boost, and playback speed controls
Whether the app is free, freemium, or subscription-based, including cost of premium features
Availability on iOS, Android, desktop, and other devices or ecosystems
How well the app helps users find new podcasts via curated lists, personalized suggestions, or trending charts
Support for video podcasts, paid subscriptions to individual podcasters, sleep timer, playlist creation, and smart play
